good.text: Third-party ad tracking is limited or can be turned off.
Children's data gets extra protection or isn't collected.

bad.text: They can change the terms at any time without telling you.
They take a broad, perpetual, sublicensable license to your content.
Their liability to you is capped at almost nothing.
They can raise prices at any time, sometimes without notice.
The service is provided 'as is' with no guarantees.

clauses.label: Silent Term Changes
clauses.summary: The policy says the company can change the privacy terms at any time and those changes become effective after 10 days, with continued use counting as acceptance.

(the “Company”) gathers from users of the Hugging Face services (the “Services”), and how the Company uses that information. The Policy is part of the Company Terms of Use. The Policy applies to all users of the Services (“Users”). clauses.label: Silent Term Changes
clauses.summary: The policy says the company can modify the rules at any time, and if you keep using the platform after 10 days of posting the new version, you are deemed to have accepted the changes.

We created the following Content Policy to outline our actions to protect our Community on our Platform and to provide important information about the Content we authorize to be posted on our Platform. This Policy is incorporated into our Terms of Service, which is a binding agreement

clauses.summary: The agreement says Hugging Face can modify the terms at any time, with changes becoming effective 10 days after posting, and continued use of the service after that means you accept the new terms.

clauses.label: Broad Content License
clauses.summary: The clause gives the company a perpetual, irrevocable, worldwide, royalty‑free license to use any feedback you provide, meaning you lose control over how your ideas are used.

clauses.label: Liability Capped
clauses.summary: The clause says the company is not liable for any changes, suspension, or ending of the services, limiting its responsibility to users.

clauses.label: Liability Capped
clauses.summary: The agreement caps the company’s total liability to the amount you paid in the past year (or $50 for free services) and limits damages to indirect or consequential types, which restricts your ability to recover larger losses.

Nothing in these Terms limit your rights under, or grants you rights that supersede, the terms and conditions of any applicable Open Source license. clauses.label: Price Changes Anytime
clauses.summary: The company can change its prices at its discretion, with new rates applying to future subscriptions, and all fees are non‑refundable.

clauses.label: No Warranties
clauses.summary: The clause says the service provides no warranties or guarantees about its performance, availability, or accuracy, and you are fully responsible for any damage from using it.
clauses.excerpt: We disclaim all warranties or guarantees of any kind, express or implied, whether arising under any law or from any usage in trade, or otherwise, including but not limited to the implied warranties of merchantability, non-infringement, quiet enjoyment, fitness for a particular purpose, or otherwise. clauses.label: Limited Tracking
clauses.summary: The company says it respects Do Not Track signals and will not use cookies or advertising when those signals are present, and it does not sell personal data to third parties for advertising without consent.
clauses.excerpt: 370, amending the California Online Privacy Protection Act to require website operators to disclose how they respond to "Do Not Track Signals"; and whether third parties collect personally identifiable information about users when they use online services. The Company honors "do not track" signals and does not track, use cookies, or use advertising when a “do not track” mechanism is in place. The Company does not authorize the collection of personally identifiable information from our users for third party use through advertising technologies without separate member consent. clauses.label: Children Protected
clauses.summary: The clause says the service is not aimed at children under 13, does not intend to collect their data, and will delete any such data if collected without parental consent.
